creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks for taking the time to submit this bug for the issue you encountered,
and we apologize that it was not addressed in a timely fashion. The FreeBSD
sound subsystem has had a large number of bug fixes and improvements over the
last year or two, and this issue may be fixed. In the absence of feedback
confirming this is still a problem on contemporary FreeBSD versions we are
closing this issue. Please open a new bug if this issue is reproducible on a
supported FreeBSD release.
